name: orc
description: Personal Claude Code marketplace for orc — the plan → debug → verify → ship workflow plugin.

plugins.name: orc
plugins.description: 58 curated skills (incl. workspace-mode for cross-repo flows), 21 composite slash commands, 12 specialist subagents, and 6 hook scripts that quietly enforce discipline (confirm-to-commit on protected branches, no AI-attribution trailers in commits/PRs, dependency pre-flight, iron rules injected at session start). Colored GitHub-callout output conventions throughout. Drives the senior-IC loop end-to-end via /orc:flow — workspace-aware: from a parent dir with multiple sibling repos, one flow spans them all with N linked PRs.
